'''Aefao''' was the [[Aefan]] [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]], located in the [[Aefao system/Legends|Aefao system]]. A remote [[Planet/Legends|planet]], it was on the other side of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] from [[Nar Shaddaa/Legends|Nar Shaddaa]].

==History==
Discovered between [[5000 BBY/Legends|5000]] and [[1000 BBY/Legends|1000 BBY]] by the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]], Aefao was a remote world on the fringe of galactic civilization as of the [[Jedi Civil War]]. Located near the areas of space controlled by the [[Darth Revan's Sith Empire|Sith Empire]], it remained part of [[Sith Worlds/Legends|Sith Space]] until the defeat of the [[Brotherhood of Darkness/Legends|Brotherhood of Darkness]] during the [[New Sith Wars]].<ref name="TEA" />

At the start of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], Aefao quickly seceded from the Republic, joining the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]]. At the end of the war, the planet was pardoned by the newly formed [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], remaining with the Empire, even after its defeat in the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. Annexed as part of [[Oversector Outer]], Aefao aligned with Warlord [[Zsinj]]'s empire and later [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn]]. As of [[11 ABY/Legends|11 ABY]] Aefao remained within the Remnant's space, but was ripped apart by the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]]. As of [[137 ABY]], Aefao remained loyal to the [[Fel Empire]]-in-Exile.
